title: Wells Fargo downgrades Lockheed Martin despite the Ukraine war
text: Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT) is up 13% versus the start of 2022 but a Wells Fargo analyst says it's pretty much as far as it goes.

title: Putin Warns, Defense Stocks Jump; Watchdog Says Nuke Markets Poised To Surge
text: The market for nuclear weapons is growing as Russia escalates its war with Ukraine and tensions rise between China, Taiwan and the U.S. The post Putin Warns, Defense Stocks Jump; Watchdog Says Nuke Markets Poised To Surge appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.
